content:
All in all, Phoenix Jackson’s entire journey highlights multiple themes such as love, sacrifice and the determination of the human spirit. Eudora Welty makes use of Phoenix’s experiences to express that love and determination above all will empower an individual to go to great lengths for their loved one. This is true to the commitment that Phoenix possesses.


Student Submission:

The submissions for this assignment are posts in the assignment's discussion. Below are the discussion posts for Vielka Clardy, or you can view the full discussion.

from Week 5 Discussion
Feb 2, 2025 7:28PM
Vielka Clardy
“A Worn Path” by Eudora Welty, the depicts a symbol of perseverance and sacrifice, which was embodied by the journey of Phoenix Jackson, which is characterized by a older woman that travels through different territories to get medicine for her grandson that is sick. Welty incorporates physical elements of internal and external struggles that Phoenix encountered, depicting her difficulties of devotion and self-sacrifice.
